title: BitOS 26.05.3
changes: Version + Update service — src/lib/updateService.ts fetches version.json from your repo (with cache-busting), compares against installed version (real version on Android via @capacitor/app, /version.txt on web). UpdatePrompt modal appears once per new version (dismissable unless mandatory: true).

APK download/install — src/lib/apkInstaller.ts streams the APK with progress bar, writes to Cache dir, then triggers Android's installer via @capacitor-community/file-opener. Added REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES, FOREGROUND_SERVICE, WAKE_LOCK permissions.
WhatsNewDialog fetches whatsnew.json and shows after upgrade only (tracked via bitos.lastSeenVersion localStorage key). Shows nothing on fresh installs.

Music engine (Monochrome/SpoFree-style) — HiFi provider (hifiProvider) hitting public TIDAL instances with fallback (hifi.401658.xyz, tidal.qqdl.site, override via localStorage.bitos.hifiInstance). Zustand store with queue, shuffle, repeat (off/all/one), seek, volume, MediaSession API integration → lockscreen / notification controls work natively. Single global <audio> survives navigation.
New bitmusic.exe page with search → enqueue/play → queue list + transports. Home widget wired to same store + links to the page.
